message:
bd-3bxhj.1.6: Comprehensive unit + property tests for contract engine modules

Adds 59 new unit tests and 15 property tests (proptest) covering:
- Malformed JSON rejection for all 4 contract types
- Schema version mismatch rejection
- Boundary threshold tests for every confidence decision zone
- Determinism checks (repeated evaluation → identical results)
- Policy evaluator lookups and sorted row generation
- Cross-contract consistency validation
- Expected-loss boundary override behavior
- Property tests: posterior monotonicity, variance bounds, credible
  interval containment, decision ordering, serialization stability

Total: 110 unit tests + 15 proptest invariants = 125 tests, all passing.
Clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1197,7 +1197,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2xj.4","title":"Shadow-mode compatibility testing against Ratatui","description":"Shadow mode: run FrankenTUI alongside Ratatui for same inputs, compare outputs. Identify behavioral differences. Publish compatibility report. This is the adoption trust-builder: users see FrankenTUI produces identical or better output vs incumbent. TRACING: span 'shadow.compare' with fields: scenario, ratatui_hash, frankentui_hash, identical. LOG: INFO for comparison results, WARN for differences. METRICS: counter shadow_comparisons_total, counter shadow_differences_total.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:46.534510704Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:10:29.361516138Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","compatibility","ratatui","shadow","wedge"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1q5.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3fc.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2xj.5","title":"5-minute getting-started guide and documentation","description":"Documentation: 5-minute quick-start (from cargo add to rendering first widget). API reference (rustdoc). Architecture overview (3-ring diagram). Migration guide from Ratatui. Galaxy-brain transparency guide (how to expose decisions). Widget catalog with screenshots. Performance tuning guide.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:46.666250904Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:46.666250904Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","docs","getting-started","wedge"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2xj.6","title":"Terminal emulator compatibility matrix (5 emulators)","description":"Automated CI testing on 5 terminal emulators: xterm-256color, screen-256color (tmux), kitty, alacritty, WezTerm. Each emulator configuration tested with full widget gallery. Compatibility matrix published in README. Issues filed as beads for any emulator-specific bugs. TRACING: span 'compat.test' with fields: emulator, test_count, pass_count, fail_count. LOG: INFO per emulator result. METRICS: gauge compat_pass_rate{emulator=...}.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:46.796758265Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:05:54.706453126Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","compatibility","emulators","wedge"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.6","depends_on_id":"bd-3fc.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Verify no linker errors when building standalone.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:46.926496015Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:46.926496015Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","standalone","test","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Widget trait methods callable without Elm runtime. Event handling works in standalone mode. LOGGING SPEC: Assert widget.render span emitted even without runtime. Verify no linker errors when building standalone.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"HazyCastle","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:46.926496015Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T02:38:16.997136747Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","standalone","test","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2xj.8","title":"Unit tests: slo.yaml schema validation and breach detection","description":"Unit tests: slo.yaml schema validation (malformed YAML rejected). Breach detection for all metric types (latency, memory, error rate). Safe-mode trigger logic. LOGGING SPEC: Assert slo.check span with correct fields. Assert WARN for breach, ERROR for safe-mode.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:47.062195031Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T23:21:37.074149172Z","closed_at":"2026-02-24T23:21:37.074130598Z","close_reason":"35 tests: schema validation (malformed YAML rejected, cross-field validation), breach detection for latency/memory/error_rate, safe-mode trigger logic (explicit flag, error rate, breach count), slo.check span with correct fields, WARN for breach, ERROR for safe-mode. Committed as 56afd701.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","slo","test","unit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.8","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2xj.9","title":"E2E test: Full shadow-mode Ratatui comparison","description":"End-to-end test: Run 10 representative scenarios through both Ratatui and FrankenTUI. Compare terminal output byte-by-byte. Report differences with visual diff. Ensure FrankenTUI matches or exceeds Ratatui on all scenarios. LOGGING SPEC: Assert shadow.compare span per scenario. Assert shadow_differences_total is zero or differences are documented improvements.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:47.198389365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:47.198389365Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["adoption","e2e","shadow","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xj.9","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:26:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2xl4e","title":"test(doom): add missing tests for palette.rs and tables.rs","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"GrayMeadow","created_at":"2026-02-09T18:38:31.159170086Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T18:45:44.761533031Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T18:40:09.606178613Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":418,"issue_id":"bd-2xl4e","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureDeer claiming this bead — adding missing tests for palette.rs and tables.rs","created_at":"2026-02-09T18:40:05Z"},{"id":419,"issue_id":"bd-2xl4e","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"GrayHill: Added 11 new tests to palette.rs (total 15) covering: color(), from_wad(), lit_color(), light_to_colormap(), wall_color(), light_factor edge cases, Default trait, colormap identity/darkening. Added 11 new tests to tables.rs (total 15) covering: tangent, pythagorean identity, sine/cosine at key angles, angle wrapping, radians conversion edge cases. All 30 tests pass. Clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-02-09T18:40:08Z"},{"id":420,"issue_id":"bd-2xl4e","author":"GrayMeadow","text":"Validation pass for bd-2xl4e on current working tree:
-  now includes broad missing unit coverage (color lookup, from_wad, lit_color, colormap range/identity/dark/special, fallback behavior).
-  now includes missing trig/angle coverage (wraparound, tangent identity, quadrant checks, radians conversions).

 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.1.3","title":"task(opentui-import contracts): Specify deterministic evidence and artifact manifest schema","description":"Objective: Define the canonical artifact manifest emitted by every migration run, including hashes, stage logs, decisions, and certification outputs.\n\nManifest fields:\n- Source fingerprint (repo commit, lockfiles, parser versions).\n- IR hash and pass-by-pass transformation hashes.\n- Generated code hash and formatter/lint versions.\n- Test outputs, benchmark outputs, and certification verdict.\n\nAcceptance criteria:\n1. Replay tooling can reconstruct stage lineage from manifest alone.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:53.281499037Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T02:21:11.803166254Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T02:21:11.803147789Z","close_reason":"Implemented: evidence manifest schema (JSON + Rust types + validation + JSONL recording + 20 tests)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["determinism","evidence","opentui-import"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:53.281499037Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:36:59.534009986Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.1.4","title":"task(opentui-import contracts): Define Bayesian confidence and risk scoring model for migration verdicts","description":"Objective: Define a calibrated Bayesian/expected-loss decision model that governs migration verdicts and adaptive controller choices across certification and rollout.

Required model components:
- Explicit state/action/loss schema (accept, hold, reject, rollback, conservative-fallback).
- Priors + likelihood updates from semantic diff, metamorphic/concolic outcomes, performance deltas, and unsupported-feature penalties.
- Calibration layer (credible intervals + conformal guardrails) with hard fallback trigger criteria.

Acceptance criteria:
1. Model inputs, priors, posterior updates, and calibration status are serialized per run and bound to claim_id/policy_id.
2. Decision output includes uncertainty bands and expected-loss rationale, not a single opaque score.
3. Auto-approve/human-review/reject/rollback boundaries are explicit, versioned, and replay-verifiable.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:53.999731818Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T02:30:11.438362261Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T02:30:11.438338186Z","close_reason":"Implemented: Bayesian confidence model (JSON schema + Rust types + Beta posterior + expected-loss engine + decision boundaries + 20 tests)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["bayesian","confidence","opentui-import"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:53.999731818Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:36:59.991943488Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:00.444175429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:00.896134820Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.1.5","title":"task(opentui-import contracts): Author licensing and provenance guardrails for imported projects","description":"Objective: Enforce licensing, provenance, and IP-risk guardrails for imported projects and any advanced migration primitive used in production-facing paths.

Required outputs:
- Per-run provenance chain from source snapshot to generated artifacts (claim/evidence linkage).
- LEGAL/IP artifact records with status (clear, expired, unknown, needs-counsel) and design-around notes when relevant.
- Policy-driven fail-safe behavior for ambiguous or missing legal/provenance evidence.

Acceptance criteria:
1. Migration fails safely when required licensing/provenance data is missing, ambiguous, or policy-noncompliant.
2. Generated projects include machine-readable provenance and attribution notices.
3. Certification/release reports surface legal/IP status and unresolved risk flags with remediation actions.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:54.491457356Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T22:20:46.949304106Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["compliance","opentui-import","provenance"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:54.491457356Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.5","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:01.351409461Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","title":"task(opentui-import contracts tests): E2E contract gate script with detailed structured logging","description":"Objective: Create an end-to-end script that runs contract validation against representative migration manifests and blocks CI on contract violations.\n\nScript expectations:\n- Inputs: staged artifacts + manifest + expected policy table.\n- Outputs: pass/fail verdict, per-clause report, JSONL execution trace.\n- Logging: timestamped stage spans, clause IDs, risk level transitions, remediation hints.\n\nAcceptance criteria:\n1. Script runs non-interactively in CI and local environments.\n2. Logs are replay-friendly and include deterministic run IDs and hashes.\n3. At least one intentionally failing fixture verifies red-path diagnostics.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:55.447139980Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:04.897495901Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["contracts","e2e","opentui-import","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:28:55.447139980Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:03.640396018Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.7","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:37:04.897432371Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.10","title":"epic(opentui-import): Alien-graveyard uplift for synthesis, formal assurance, and shadow-run adoption","description":"Background:
This epic operationalizes alien-graveyard + alien-artifact-coding methods so OpenTUI→FrankenTUI migration is not heuristic glue code, but a formally constrained, executable, replayable decision system with strong safety/fallback behavior.

North star:
Convert advanced math and systems ideas into production-grade, deterministic migration policy that improves outcomes while remaining auditable and operator-safe.

Capability pillars:
1) Contracts + provenance:
- Contracts-as-code engine, artifact-graph IDs, claim/evidence/policy/trace linkage.
2) Formal decision core:
- Closed-form Bayesian posterior + expected-loss policy + formal guarantee wrappers.
3) Graveyard executable workflow:
- Symptom-router/Fast-Start harvesting, composability/risk matrices, entry-header/graduation schema, graveyardctl verification.
4) Robust artifact-coding extensions:
- Dependence-aware conjugate fusion, sequential FDR wealth control, minimal-flip counterfactual audits, graceful degradation compiler, assumption applicability checker, L0-L3 galaxy-brain contracts.
5) Testing and proof gates:
- Deep unit/property suites + end-to-end gauntlets with deterministic replay artifacts and red-path safety diagnostics.
6) Release enforcement:
- RC promotion blocked unless all mandatory alien + optimization + certification gauntlets pass and artifact clauses are machine-valid.

Execution map (high level):
- Foundation + governance track: .10.1-.10.20
- Formal inference/guarantee track: .10.21-.10.28
- Graveyard executable track: .10.29-.10.37
- Advanced artifact-coding track: .10.38-.10.45

Success criteria:
1) Every advanced primitive/controller has budgeted mode, deterministic fallback, and replayable evidence traces.
2) Recommendation contracts are machine-linted for EV/tier, metadata schema, risk countermeasures, guarantees, comparator, rollback, and demo linkage completeness.
3) Mandatory gauntlets pass for route→rank→contract→verify→demo→release pipelines before RC promotion.
4) CI fails on missing artifacts, unsafe composition, violated assumptions, invalid guarantees, or policy-breaking optimizations.
5) Operators can reconstruct any migration decision (and nearest counterfactual flip) from structured logs alone.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:38.728311183Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T22:46:25.850012731Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-graveyard","formal-methods","opentui-import"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:38.728311183Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3bxhj.10.1","title":"task(opentui-import alien): Implement contracts-as-code engine and artifact-graph IDs (claim/evidence/policy/trace)","description":"Objective: Convert migration contracts and policy clauses into machine-executable contracts-as-code, with first-class artifact graph identifiers linking every claim to evidence and policy decisions.\n\nAcceptance criteria:\n1. Contract clauses compile into executable validators used in CI and runtime gating.\n2. Artifact graph IDs (claim_id, evidence_id, policy_id, trace_id) are emitted consistently across pipeline stages.\n3. Missing linkage fails validation; no orphan claims allowed.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:39.187036875Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:11.301960470Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-graveyard","artifact-graph","contracts-as-code","opentui-import"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:10.839989484Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-24T22:12:11.301910666Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3bxhj.10.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3bxhj.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-24T21:49:39.187036875Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
